summary: DB Agent: produce DB_CHANGESET for LCS CID/SID/MID pipeline. Create migration 005 with three new tables (lcs.cid, lcs.sid_output, lcs.mid_sequence_state) and alter lcs.frame_registry. All tables append-only, by-value references, no FKs. Must include rollback plan, validation steps, and risk classification.

schema_context.lcs.cid: New table. CID compiler registry — tracks all minted communication_ids with compilation state, signal source, frame binding, and company reference. Append-only.
schema_context.lcs.sid_output: New table. SID message construction output — captures constructed message content, template resolution, and variable bindings per communication. Append-only.
schema_context.lcs.mid_sequence_state: New table. MID delivery sequence state — tracks delivery sequencing, gate verdicts, adapter routing decisions, and attempt lifecycle per message_run_id. Append-only.
schema_context.lcs.frame_registry: Alter existing table. Add columns to support CID/SID/MID pipeline integration — compilation rules, SID template binding, MID sequence configuration.

constraints: All new tables append-only (INSERT only, no UPDATE/DELETE)
Must follow existing LCS naming conventions
Registry-first: column_registry.yml must be updated before migration SQL
